name: Yamada Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Yamada Holdings Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, engages in the reuse and recycling of used home appliances in Japan. The company operates through five segments: Housing, Environmental Resources Development, Finance, Services, and Consumer Electronics. It provides house renovation services; and financial products, including mortgages, non-life insurance products, life planning, and payment services. The company also offers its products online. It operates approximately 12,858 stores. The company was formerly known as Yamada Denki Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yamada Holdings Co., Ltd. in October 2020. Yamada Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Takasaki, Japan.
